instructions: Each art slot maps to a [data-art-slot] attribute in index.html. Drop generated images into /art-slots/ with the matching filename. The placeholder element auto-loads if the file exists. Recommended: square crops, transparent or solid backgrounds, consistent palette per category.

slots.subject: central ritual mark / sigil for the game logo
slots.notes: Should read clearly inside a circular gold frame at 200x200. Dramatic, symmetrical, mystical.

runes.art_direction: Each rune is a single distinct sigil/glyph painted on aged parchment. Hand-drawn, illuminated manuscript style. Glowing edges where appropriate. Centered composition. Distinct silhouette readable at thumbnail size.

slots.concept: A small candle flame caught between two fingertips, drawn as a sigil. Warm orange glow.
A single suspended droplet with concentric ripples beneath it. Cool blue, silver linework.
An angular polyhedron of carved stone, mossy edges, set inside a circle. Earthen browns.
Three curving wind lines emerging from a central dot. Pale grey-blue, delicate.
A perfect ring with darkness inside, ringed by tiny tick marks. Deep purple-black.
A six-pointed star with one elongated ray, golden filament, halation.
A crescent moon partially obscured by a horizontal drape of darkness. Indigo and silver.
A precise cross with four small numerals at the points. Gold leaf on cream.
A many-sided die mid-tumble, surrounded by random tally marks. Magenta and gold sparks.
A bell-shape with three concentric ripple-bells emerging from it. Brass gold.
Two crescents forming a yin-yang of cracked glass. Iridescent.
A starburst of flame petals, eight points, hot center white. Orange-red.
A vertical chain of three diminishing droplets, each connected by a wavy line. Aquamarine.
An anchor-cross with roots growing into the earth below. Bronze and umber.
A feather pulled by an unseen current, leaving a curving trail. Pale silver.
A downward spiral of dark liquid disappearing into a small drain glyph. Deep purple.
A lighthouse-style burst with twelve evenly spaced rays. Hot gold.
Two infinity-loops intertwined, one bright one dark. Violet and silver.
A serpent biting its own tail, scales like alchemical sigils. Crimson and gold leaf.
Two identical sigils overlapping at the center, slight rotational offset. Mirror-bright gold.
Three interlocked spirals forming a triskelion. Celtic-illuminated, gold on green-black.
Flames forming a chain of running figures, sweeping across the sigil. Vermillion.
A vertical wall of crested wave, foam at top, deep blue base. Hokusai-inspired.
Cracked ground in an eight-pointed fracture pattern, depth in cracks. Sandstone and ash.
Three lightning bolts forming a triangle around a tornado funnel. Cyan and steel.
A black disc with corona ring, single golden tear of light at three o'clock. Astral.
A spiral that nests into itself infinitely, Escher-like, gold ink on indigo. Sacred geometry.
A crown of seven different sigils orbiting a central void. Black gold, asymmetric chaos.
A pinprick of light pulling all lines toward it, accretion disc effect. Deep violet to white.
A radiant crown of nine colored rays in a halo arrangement, prismatic. Iridescent gold.

enemies.format: PNG, dark background (will be masked into circle)
enemies.art_direction: Each enemy is a portrait painted in a dark, baroque style. Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting. Slightly unsettling but not gross. Faceless or partially-obscured features. Like portraits in a haunted library.

slots.concept: A small flickering being made of soot and embers, hunched. Reluctant. Coal-black with orange glow inside its chest cavity.
A ghostly translucent figure, half-formed, drifting upward. Pale ice-blue. Disinterested expression suggested.
A small, mossy, stone-skinned thing with lichen growing on its shoulders. Stubborn squat posture. Forest greens, mineral browns.
A robed figure with too many teeth visible through the dark hood, no eyes. Tatters of black cloth. Purple-black palette with bone-white teeth highlight.
A water-haired figure half-submerged, mouth open in song but the wrong shape. Deep blue-green, scaled details, eerie.
A man-shaped automaton of brass, hollow inside, with bell-mouth where head should be. Verdigris and gold. Stoic, regal pose.
A serpentine creature made of fractured stained glass, multiple eye-shapes embedded across its body. Iridescent, cracked.
A regal silhouette wearing a crown of seven runes, robed in shadow, eyes closed but somehow watching. The most ornate image. Black and gold, single red highlight.

claude_code_handoff.step_1: User generates each image via Midjourney using prompts in ART_DIRECTION.md
claude_code_handoff.step_2: User drops final PNGs into /art-slots/ directory matching the filenames above
claude_code_handoff.step_3: Run swap-art.js (provided) to replace placeholder elements with tags, OR rely on the runtime fallback (already in index.html) which auto-loads matching art-slots/ files
